case_title: GREENE, GERALD VS STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREENE, GERALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY MERRIHEW, ANITA M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
